request.description: 为商品1002在仓库1预测未来14天目标库存，比较至少三种算法，结合现货、在途、欠单和补货约束给出建议，并保存完整验证证据。

plan.rationale: 该任务要求为商品 1002 在仓库 1 预测未来 14 天，并以 inventory_cost 为主要目标。历史序列被识别为 weekly_seasonal，共有 180 个观测，零需求比例为 0.00%。因此先从知识图谱检索与该需求画像匹配的能力，再保留可解释基线，形成 seasonal_naive, croston, last_value 三类候选。最终不由语言模型主观决定，而是使用 inventory_cost 及决胜指标执行无时间泄漏滚动回测；生成代码还必须通过安全、接口、稳定性和参考行为等价验证后才允许沉淀为新版本。

knowledge_evidence.name: seasonal_naive
knowledge_evidence.description: Repeat the latest weekly pattern over the forecast horizon.
knowledge_evidence.history_evidence: 已有 2 次历史验证，成功率 100%，历史平均库存成本 0.00

knowledge_evidence.name: croston
knowledge_evidence.description: Estimate non-zero demand size and the interval between demands separately.
knowledge_evidence.history_evidence: 已有 1 次历史验证，成功率 100%，历史平均库存成本 40.11

knowledge_evidence.name: last_value
knowledge_evidence.description: Repeat the latest observed demand as a transparent baseline.
knowledge_evidence.history_evidence: 暂无历史验证，作为待比较候选

design_basis.selection_rule: 按 inventory_cost 排序，使用验证配置中的 tie-breakers 决胜；模型名仅用于完全相同时的确定性排序。
design_basis.release_gate: 语法、导入安全、统一接口、受限运行、确定性、边界输入和数值等价。

risks: 周周期较明显，节假日或促销变化可能破坏历史周期。

capabilities.name: croston
capabilities.description: Estimate non-zero demand size and the interval between demands separately.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history with possible zero-demand periods.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: Forecasting and Stock Control for Intermittent Demands
extraction_warnings: This implementation is classic Croston rather than the Syntetos-Boylan adjustment.

capabilities.name: last_value
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest observed demand as a transparent baseline.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: M5 accuracy competition results, findings, and conclusions

capabilities.name: moving_average
capabilities.description: Forecast stable demand with the mean of the most recent observations.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: The accuracy of intermittent demand estimates

capabilities.name: ridge_lag
capabilities.description: Fit regularized autoregression on recent demand lags and forecast recursively.
capabilities.input_contract: Dense non-negative daily history with enough observations for lag construction.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.

capabilities.name: seasonal_naive
capabilities.description: Repeat the latest weekly pattern over the forecast horizon.
capabilities.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capabilities.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capabilities.source_title: M5 accuracy competition results, findings, and conclusions

capability_spec.name: seasonal_naive
capability_spec.description: Repeat the latest weekly pattern over the forecast horizon.
capability_spec.input_contract: Non-negative daily demand history and a positive forecast horizon.
capability_spec.output_contract: Non-negative daily forecast and horizon-total target inventory.
capability_spec.source_title: M5 accuracy competition results, findings, and conclusions

validation_profile.name: inventory_target
validation_profile.description: Minimize asymmetric shortage and overstock cost.

alternatives.reason_not_selected: 主指标比选中方案高 5.5730（越低越好）
主指标比选中方案高 39.0000（越低越好）

selection_explanation.system_inference: 选中方案在相同历史窗口、相同成本和相同预测周期下综合表现最佳。
selection_explanation.business_boundary: 该结论是历史数据上的相对比较；促销、断货和供应变化仍需人工复核。

replenishment.formula: max(目标库存 + 安全库存 + 欠单 - 现货 - 在途库存, 0)

algorithm_steps: normalize history to finite non-negative numeric observations
apply seasonal_naive semantics using declared parameters
produce exactly horizon non-negative float values
sum the daily forecast into target_inventory
architecture.performance_goal: avoid repeated full-history copies and unnecessary nested loops

business_definition.target: 未来预测周期内非聚划算支付件数的总和

validation_profile.name: inventory_target
validation_profile.description: Minimize asymmetric shortage and overstock cost.

multi_agent_collaboration.protocol: architecture -> parallel implementation -> independent review -> validation

performance_analysis.measurement_scope: Isolated deterministic micro-benchmark; tracemalloc covers Python allocations and may not include all native-library memory.
recommendations: 当前基准未触发资源告警；继续保留回归基准，避免无证据的过早优化。

design_explanation.summary: 使用可复现规则完成需求理解、模型检索与验证。
design_explanation.evidence_scope: 由任务、需求画像、候选回测、代码验证和资源基准构成；不替代业务审批。
